name: Delete Sheet
description: Deletes a specific sheet from a Google Sheets spreadsheet and logs the result. A minimal, on-demand example workflow.
shortDescription: A minimal example workflow that deletes a sheet from a Google Sheets spreadsheet.
keyFeatures: Google Sheets sheet deletion by sheet ID
prerequisites: Google Sheets connection with access to the target spreadsheet
idealFor: Developers learning ByteChef who want a minimal Google Sheets example.
steps: Delete the specified sheet from the Google Sheets spreadsheet.
